title: Connected Observer
description: Connect all the sides of the observer!
body:
![Continuity](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgit.sr.ht%2F~aeldit%2FMC-Resource-Packs%2Fblob%2Fmain%2Fimages%2Frequires_continuity.svg&n=-1) or [![Optifine](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Frequires%2Foptifine_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://optifine.net/home)



Connect the front , the top , bottom and the sides of the observers to be better together

### Versions
- 1.19
- 1.19.1
- 1.19.2
